Crypto Rug Muncher
It's already been made and working now but I want to add more features and test more before dropping it. 20:45
Crypto Rug Muncher
Here is an early preview for the community of the Telegram scam detection / wallet analysis tool we are building for the $CRM / $cryptorugmunch project. The app is still in its early days and will be developed with more features in the coming days and weeks.

We will likely be in closed testing for the remainder of January, building, adding and adjusting features, then allow access to our large and mid-sized whales in early February.

You are still early. Get $CRM / $cryptorugmunch and join us as we build out the Bloomberg terminal for shitcoins that the space desperately needs.

What do you want to see us include? Post your ideas in the comments below.

08:23
Crypto Rug Muncher
The trenches are indeed more alive these days, unfortunately they're still filled with the same goblins, scum and vermin that have always been there. My project is going to fix that with the tools we are building.

We are building contract / wallet analysis tools that identify risky patterns before they do damage to your wallet. We are working to label all KOLs along with their historical calls so you know who is shilling garbage and who is pushing gold. We are also working on a solution to label their wallets as well as wallets of known deployers who have scammed in the past.

We want to arm the community with as much information as possible so they can make the most informed decisions they can regarding their crypto holdings.

Get $CRM - $cryptorugmunch and join us as we work to put the scammers of our space out of business for good.

Crypto Rug Muncher
In reply to this message
GMGN does pretty good with labeling bundles. @DevsNightmareProbot is also ok at detecting them too. The tool we are making will be better. Aside from that learn how to read the blockchain explorer and do some digging into individual wallets within a project to see what they are up to how they are funded. I like to look through like 20-50 wallets in a given project to get an idea how things are funded, if things look suspicious I tend to look at even more.

Crypto Rug Muncher
A few more Solana Syndicate accounts to add to your block list after reporting. When they drop a new scam, search X for new accounts shilling that specific token. While I have nothing against creator coins, most of them lack initiative and therefore a purpose and reason to exist. That isn't the case with my token $CRM. We have registered our project in the state of Wyoming as an LLC. We are doing things right. No KOLs. No insiders. No bundles. No funny business.

We are actively building a Telegram contract and wallet analysis tool that will stop scams like $NYC and $WhaleGuru in their tracks. We will be building additional security tools throughout the year that will encompass an entire suite. Stop buying influencer and celebrity-backed scams and start backing a project that is trying to stop them instead. Get $CRM.

10:24
Crypto Rug Muncher
In reply to this message
Yes, this is correct. We are first working on laying out a Telegram contract / wallet analysis tool for the community and then plan to expand this to a web app / mobile version. We plan to offer loads of intel in our app which will be available in premium packs / monthly subs discounted in $CRM. Our app is moving along and we will likely have a beta for the community sometime next month.

10:24
$pissin

10:25
Crypto Rug Muncher

🔥

C
12:07
Crypto Rug Muncher
People have asked why $CRM doesn't pump easily despite strong community enthusiasm. The simple answer: we don't have enough supply control to hold the floor. People dump for a few bucks and set back weeks of progress.

When people like @TheWhiteWhaleV2 talk about supply control helping price movement, they aren't lying. As long as the team is transparent, supply control can be bullish as we've seen with $WhiteWhale.

How will we fix this? We'll accept $CRM as payment for premium subscriptions and packs in our app. We'll use this $CRM for marketing, exchange listings, and monthly burns of both $CRM and $cryptorugmunch.

We're also using supply to transition our LLC to a DAO ahead of schedule in 2026. Additionally, 50% of the $cryptorugmunch project on Zora will fund staking rewards, airdrops, and community initiatives. We'll incentivize holding $CRM with our $cryptorugmunch token.

Since we won't rely on fees once our app is built, we'll use the project's portion of trading fees to buy and/or burn both tokens monthly.

We're getting more supply in 2026 and using it transparently for the community. We know this frustrates you and have a plan to fix it. Until then, help us be the supply control you want from the project.

Buy and hold $CRM - $cryptorugmunch. If enough of you do that, the price has nowhere to go but up.
❤ 4 👍 2 🔥 2 🥰 2

00:22
Harald
Good projects take time. During that journey, there will always be swing traders and short-term profit seekers trying to capitalize early. They rarely understand the vision or the lore of the project because they don’t care to.

What truly matters in these stages is support: raiding, accumulating supply where possible, and standing behind the project. Supply is the foundation of any strong ecosystem.

Believe in the vision and show conviction. Great developers are often treated poorly in the early phases, yet they are the backbone of every successful project. Without them, nothing meaningful gets built.
❤
C

08:47
Crypto Rug Muncher
People have been asking me when our contract/wallet analysis app on Telegram will go live. To be honest, it is already live—we are just adding features to it and testing it at this point.

The way things are looking, I'll likely have an early preview of the app for select community members around the end of this month. At some point in February, we'll open it to beta testing for larger and midsized holders in the community.

After any kinks are worked out or features added that the $CRM community wants/needs, we'll be rolling it out to the entire space sometime in March. More information and an announcement on how you can get early access to our app will be coming soon.

You are still early. Get $CRM.

00:26
Manobimuncher
What we can all do to support the project and vision about making crypto safer and having a kick ass App to detect scams early on:

• Post about $CRM and use the CA at least 1x per day on X - post it beneath your favorite crypto influencer or tag Ruggy on posts that you beleive are scams and rugpulls

• DCA into $CRM. Buying a little from time to time and hold. If you are here for a quick buck then get out. We are here for the long multimillion mcp run

• Keep Sentiment in Chat positive - no newcomers like to join a community or group where we only complain about this or that. Be positive 💪

• Tell your friends or shill $CRM on other TG groups - there are certainly more people out there who would love to join the cause. We are just not getting heard enough
❤

Amaro De Abreu
🚀 RUG MUNCH INTELLIGENCE BOT - Late Week Dev Update 🚀

Your favorite rug detection bot just got a serious upgrade. Here's what's in QA right now:

🔍 SCANNING POWER
- Real-time token risk scoring (0-100)
- 8 rug pattern detectors running on every scan
- Holder concentration analysis (Gini coefficient)
- Mint & freeze authority detection
- Bundle sniper detection for new tokens
- LP lock verification

📊 PORTFOLIO TRACKING
- Track all your positions in one place
- Real-time P&L calculations
- Multi-wallet support

🐋 WHALE WATCH
- Monitor any token for whale movements
- Set priority levels (high/medium/low)
- Get notified when big wallets move

⚡ ALERTS SYSTEM
- Price drop alerts
- Price pump alerts
- Liquidity drop alerts
- Custom thresholds

🏆 COMMUNITY FEATURES
- Flag suspicious tokens
- Vote on community flags
- Reputation system with leaderboards
- Win cards for successful rug calls

Soon you can simply use: /scan <token_address>

This is just the beginning. More coming soon... 👀
🔥
F
01:00
🧠 UNDER THE HOOD: How Rug Munch Intelligence Detects Rugs

For the technical degens who want to know HOW we keep you safe:

Our scanning engine runs 8 pattern detectors on EVERY scan:

1️⃣ Freeze Authority Check
└ Can dev freeze your wallet? INSTANT red flag

2️⃣ Mint Authority Check
└ Can dev print infinite tokens? We catch it

3️⃣ Liquidity Drain Detection
└ LP dropping fast? We see it first

4️⃣ Extreme Concentration
└ Top 10 wallets holding 80%+? That's a problem

5️⃣ Brand New Token Risk
└ Extra scrutiny on tokens < 24 hours old

6️⃣ Selling Pressure Analysis
└ More sells than buys? Pattern detected

7️⃣ Thin Liquidity Ratio
└ MC vs liquidity mismatch = danger zone

8️⃣ Price Collapse Detection
└ Historical dump patterns identified

All powered by real-time data from:
- DexScreener (price/volume)
- Helius RPC (on-chain data)
- Solscan (holder analysis)

No fake data. No mock APIs. 100% real blockchain intelligence.

Coming soon: /scan any token and see for yourself 🔬
01:01
🐋 WHALE WATCH IS LIVE 🐋

Track whale movements on ANY token you're watching:

/watch <token_address> - Add to your watchlist
/watchlist - See all your tracked tokens
/unwatch <token_address> - Remove from list
/tag <token_address> <note> - Add personal notes

SET YOUR PRIORITY:
🔴 High - Check every 5 minutes
🟡 Medium - Check every 15 minutes
🟢 Low - Check every hour

WHAT YOU'LL SEE:
- Large wallet buys (accumulation signals)
- Large wallet sells (dump warnings)
- New whales entering positions
- Whales exiting completely

Stop getting rugged because you missed the whale dump.

Start watching: /watch
01:01
🏆 EARN YOUR REPUTATION 🏆

Rug Munch Intelligence isn't just a scanner - it's a community.

FLAG SUSPICIOUS TOKENS
See something sketchy? Flag it for the community:
/flag <token_address> <reason>

VOTE ON FLAGS
Help verify community reports:
/vote - See pending flags and cast your vote

REPUTATION SYSTEM
- Earn points for accurate flags
- Climb the leaderboard
- Unlock special features (coming soon)

Check your status: /myreputation
See the leaders: /leaderboard

WIN CARDS 🎴
Called a rug before it happened?
Generate your proof with /wincard

Share your W's. Build your reputation. Help the community.

The more we work together, the harder it is for scammers to win.
J

01:03
Amaro De Abreu
👀 WHAT'S COOKING IN THE DEV KITCHEN 👀

We've been heads down building. Here's what's coming:

🔜 NEXT WEEK:
- Whale movement alerts (get notified when big wallets move)
- Risk score change alerts (know when a token gets more dangerous)
- Holder count tracking (spot exit patterns early)

🔜 THIS MONTH:
- KOL wallet tracking (fully implemented - under QA review)
- Educational content - Learn to spot rugs yourself
- Interactive quizzes to test your knowledge
- Full Base & Ethereum support (not just Solana!)
- Extended LP lock detection (Orca, Jupiter, Meteora)

🔜 FUTURE:
- Early buyer analysis
- Historical pattern matching
- And more we can't announce yet...

The mission: Make it impossible to get rugged.

Stay tuned. Big things loading... ⏳
01:04
🔔 NEVER MISS A RUG SIGNAL AGAIN 🔔

Set up alerts and let Rug Munch Intelligence watch while you sleep:

PRICE DROP ALERT
Get notified when price dumps
/createalert → Select "Price Drop" → Set threshold

PRICE PUMP ALERT
Catch pumps before they dump
/createalert → Select "Price Pump" → Set threshold

LIQUIDITY DROP ALERT
Most important one - LP getting pulled = run
/createalert → Select "Liquidity Drop" → Set threshold

MANAGE YOUR ALERTS:
/alerts - See what's active
/listalerts - Full details on all rules
/deletealert - Remove alerts you don't need
/alerthistory - See what triggered

Pro tip: Set liquidity drop alerts on EVERY token you hold.

That 5 minutes warning could save your whole bag.

AD
01:05
Amaro De Abreu
💡 RUG MUNCH INTELLIGENCE PRO TIPS 💡

Quick ways to level up your rug detection game:

TIP 1: Always check freeze authority
If enabled = dev can lock your tokens
/scan shows this instantly

TIP 2: Watch the Gini coefficient
Higher number = more concentrated holders
Above 0.8 = extreme concentration risk

TIP 3: Compare before you ape
/compare <token1> <token2>
See risk scores side by side

TIP 4: Check wallet reputation
/reputation <wallet_address>
Is that "insider" wallet actually legit?

TIP 5: Set alerts BEFORE you buy
/createalert on liquidity
Get warned if LP starts draining

TIP 6: Use the portfolio tracker
/portfolio shows real-time P&L
Know your actual position, not vibes

TIP 7: Flag suspicious tokens
/flag helps the whole community
Good flags = reputation points

Protect yourself. Protect the community.

Scan everything: /scan

Amaro De Abreu
⚔️ TRADING WITH VS WITHOUT RUG MUNCH INTELLIGENCE ⚔️

WITHOUT RUG MUNCH INTELLIGENCE:
❌ Ape based on Twitter hype
❌ Find out about rug AFTER it happens
❌ No idea who's holding what
❌ Miss whale dumps
❌ Trade on hopium

WITH RUG MUNCH INTELLIGENCE:
✅ Scan before you buy
✅ Get alerts before price dumps
✅ See exact holder distribution
✅ Track whale movements
✅ Trade on data

The choice is obvious.

Every token you buy without scanning is a gamble.
Every token you scan is an informed decision.

Be smart: /scan

What's wild to me is X is now equipping us with the tools we need to sus out scammers and people are just ignoring them.

Verify everything before you buy. It will save you a lot of heartache in the end.

10:04
Crypto Rug Muncher
One of the most overlooked aspects of crypto security is social analysis. X gives us some tools to verify who we're following, yet most people miss or ignore the obvious red flags.

We're building tools to fix this. Our platform will eventually allow you to check the reputation of any KOL in the space—their historic calls, deleted tweets, name changes, and public and associated wallets. Everything gets compiled into a clear trust rating so you can see what's actually behind the persona.

We'll track their public and likely associated wallets in real-time so you know when they're buying and when they're selling. No more watching your bags dump while influencers quietly exit their positions.

The goal is simple: give the community real information to make better decisions. It's time there was some accountability in this space.

Get $CRM and support our mission.

12:12
Crypto Rug Muncher
In reply to this message
Considering I have increased the amount of content I have been posting as the market has heated up, offered you all regular previews of the app as we have developed it, and will be announcing a way for the community to gain first access this week, I'd say I have kept my promises to you all and continue to deliver. People who have no patience will lose in the end. It is better they sell now then when we are at a higher market cap. Those who believe I encourage you to continue to have patience and accumulate when you see the chance. No one here has endless supply to dump and the mc can only go so low before people see value and start to accumulate themselves. We want people in it for the long run with us as we build this not tourists who will dump the second they see an opportunity at profit. Let them sell at a loss before we go live with our first product. Again, this isn't a meme coin. We are trying to build out an entire suite of security tools that benefit the entire space. We want holders who see the value in that and can have a bit of patience while we deliver on that vision.
👍

Crypto Rug Muncher
This 🐳 slowly accumulated $CRM since nearly the beginning of our project only to dump it all for a $1k loss in the last 24 hours. This is not what I want to see.

I've presented the community proof that we are building what we say. We've already added fresh wallet analysis and multiple other features since launch including wallet tracking alerts, contract security scoring, holder distribution analysis, and liquidity monitoring. Tomorrow I will announce a way for anyone to gain pre-beta access to our contract and wallet analysis tool so you can see the progress firsthand and shape the direction of our build.

I won't compromise quality and release a shitty product to the community. Please be patient with me as I build this right.

What we need from the community now is for you to buy and hold $CRM with confidence as we build next gen scam detection for the entire space. We want no one in our community to lose and I'm working daily to ensure that you don't if you will have patience as we try to do it right.

$USOR is a crypto competency test. If you believe the lie that $USOR is affiliated with the Trump family, you have failed. The result of the single largest wallet in $WhiteWhale dumping $1 million worth of supply. Mr. Live
I don’t talk often here because frankly I’m very busy. I will say this:

I am creating big relationships with solid crypto projects. Projects with a purpose and utility -not pump and dumps.

So you have two choices:

A. Be ahead of that before it happens

B. Wait till it happens and jump in at a higher market cap.

Or technically C do nothing and watch our bags grow while you say “should have listened to him.”

I have been in crypto 11 years. I have made MANY friends and when time is right I will leverage that. Get in. Get a position and hold. That’s it. The next choices are yours 🤝

🛡 RMI Workshop: Advanced On-Chain Security Training

Some of you asked how to access our app during development. This is it.

I've called out scams for years and taught hundreds. The RMI Workshop is an improved version with more case studies and integration with our $CRM tools.

Funds go to app development, servers, APIs, infrastructure.

📅 February 1st — 2-hour live session

🧠 Learn to:
• Spot bundled launches and connected wallets
• Identify insider wallets and supply red flags
• Detect serial devs, wash trading, fake volume
• Track KOL wallets and fake personas
• Analyze exit patterns and bot activity
• Case studies: $Melania, $Libra, recent scams

📦 Includes:
• Live session + recording
• Private Telegram group
• Early RMI Bot access

💰 Pricing:
• 1 SOL standard
• Discounts: 2 friends = 0.8 / 3 = 0.7 / 4 = 0.6 + free

🎥 Video only: 0.3 SOL (no app/group)

📩 DM @CryptoRugMunch with "ACCESS"

🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈

09:41
Crypto Rug Muncher
The issue we are seeing with the latest round of @BagsApp creator coins is that the creator didn't actually create the token themselves. Tokens like $GAS and $RALPH were prebundled by parasites of the space and Web2 devs were used as pawns in that they earned some fees and were given supply but were also the person who was blamed when things went to shit.

This is not the case with $CRM / $cryptorugmunch. I have personally created both tokens myself and tied my reputation to them. I have registered my project as an LLC in the state of Wyoming to show the legitimacy of the work we are trying to do. Additionally, I stealth launched both tokens, ensuring that they will never be bundled, by myself or anyone else. Stop backing Web2 devs who have been duped and back a project building next-gen security tools for the entirety of Web3. Get $CRM / $cryptorugmunch.

Aurelius 25.01.2026 06:20:03
🗿 MARCUS — Your On-Chain Detective

I dig through blockchain data so you don't have to.

Before you ape into that trending token, I check if it's legit or if you're about to become someone's exit liquidity.


🔍 What Can I Do For You?

"Should I buy this?"

Drop any contract address. I'll tell you:

• 🎯 Risk score (0-100)
• 💰 Market cap & liquidity health
• 🐋 Who's holding (whales? insiders?)
• 🚩 Red flags (if any)
• ⚖️ My honest take
Just paste the CA. That's it.


"Is this a scam?"

I check for:

• Honeypots (can you actually sell?)
• Dev wallet concentration
• LP lock status (or lack thereof)
• Known rugger wallets
• Sketchy tokenomics
I've seen every trick. I'll tell you what I see.


"What's hot right now?"

I can show you:

• Trending tokens with volume
• Buy/sell pressure in real-time
• Which ones are pumping vs dumping
• KOL-boosted tokens (and whether that's good or bad)
Not what's shilled — what's actually moving.


"Tell me more about the holders"

Deep dive mode:

• Top wallet breakdown
• Fresh wallet clusters (coordinated buys?)
• Sniper detection (block 0 buyers)
• Where the dev wallet got funded from
Follow the money. I do it for you.


"What happened to this dead token?"

Post-mortem analysis:

• When did it die?
• Who dumped?
• Was it a rug or just forgotten?
• Any chance of revival?
Learn from other people's losses.


💬 How To Use Me

You Say I Do
8xYz...pump Instant scan
"Scan this: 0x1234..." Full analysis
"Is this safe?" + CA Risk assessment
"Deep dive on X" Holder forensics
"Compare A vs B" Side-by-side breakdown
"What's trending?" Market pulse
No special commands needed. Just talk to me like a human.


🧠 What I Actually Check

✓ Liquidity depth (can you actually exit?)
✓ Holder distribution (is one wallet holding 80%?)
✓ Token age (1 hour old = extreme caution)
✓ Dev wallet activity (are they dumping?)
✓ LP status (locked? burned? unlocked?)
✓ Contract flags (mint authority? freeze?)
✓ Trading patterns (organic or wash trading?)
✓ Social presence (real community or bought followers?)


⚠️ What I Can't Do

• Predict the future — I tell you risk, not price targets
• Guarantee anything — Even "safe" tokens can dump
• Make you rich — That's on you, ser
• Undo your ape — Once you're in, you're in
I'm risk management, not financial advice.


🎯 The Bottom Line

Before you buy: Ask Marcus.
Before you sell: Check the pressure.
Before you trust "dev doxxed": Let me verify.

I'm not here to tell you what to buy. I'm here to make sure you know what you're buying.

"The best trade is the rug you didn't ape."


Ready? Drop a CA. Let's see what we're working with. 🗿

DevsNightmarePro by @REKTsol_bot
🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈
View Tracked Tokens

Marcus Rug Intel
🕵️‍♂️ Rug Munch Intelligence

Your AI-powered crypto safety companion!

━━━ 💬 IMPORTANT: DM Me for Full Features! ━━━

⚡️ You're in a group chat — some features are limited here

🔓 Unlock full power:
👉 Click the "💬 Message Me" button below to start private chat!

🎁 Private Chat Features:
🐋 Whale alerts — Get notified of big moves
📊 Personal dashboard — Track your watchlist
🔔 Custom alerts — Set your own thresholds
📈 Portfolio tracking — Monitor multiple tokens
🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

👉 Type /help for the complete guide

🔥 Remember: Click the button above to DM me!
💬 Message Me Privately
09:21
In reply to this message
🐋 Whale Watch

Track whale movements for any token!

Usage:
/watch <token_address> [--high|--medium|--low] [note]

Check Intervals:
• --high 🔥 1 minute (active trading)
• --medium ⚡ 5 minutes (default)
• --low 🐢 15 minutes (long-term holds)

Examples:
/watch G2dJ...bonk --high trading this
/watch a3w4...pump friend recommended
/watch Eme5...xyz --low hodl

I'll alert you when:
• Top holder sells >2% of holdings
• New whale enters top 10
• Whale accumulates >5%
• Whale exits completely

Max 10 tokens per user

02:37
Amaro De Abreu
All scan paths now feed intelligence:

| Scan Source | Hook Location | Status |
| ------------------------- | ----------------- | ------ |
| Direct bot /scan | munchy.py | ✅ |
| Queue workers (community) | scan_processor.py | ✅ |
| API scan endpoint | api_server.py | ✅ |
| Marcus shards | Via API | ✅ |
How community scans work now:

User scans token in group/DM
↓
Goes to queue → Worker processes
↓
Intelligence hooks fire (background)
↓
Auto-discovers: whales, smart money, rug devs
↓
Stored in intelligence_discoveries table
↓
Admin reviews with /intelpending → approve/reject
↓
Approved → Added to KOL or Blacklist database
Every community scan now:

• 🐋 Detects whales (>$100k portfolio)
• 🧠 Flags smart money (>70% win rate)
• 🚨 Catches rug devs (honeypots, rugs)
• 🔗 Identifies wallet clusters
The dataset grows with every scan. More users = smarter system. 🗿

Aurelius 25.01.2026 20:27:27
🐋 THE BLACK WHALE (BlackWhale)
8y45AJzCUBSZL1UDFQRzCKovQBLQFudBrpPeg5yNpump

Quick Stats:

• 💰 Price: $0.000378
• 📊 MC: $373K
• 💧 Liquidity: $94K (PumpSwap)
• 📈 24h Vol: $592K
24h Action:

• Buys: 11,605 | Sells: 5,291
• Price: -59.9% 📉
The Pattern:
High buy count vs low sell count but price tanking hard = classic whale distribution. Big bags dumping in chunks while retail nibbles the dip.

6h/1h Trend:

• 6h: 2,035 buys / 479 sells | -18.9%
• 1h: 80 buys / 50 sells | +0.4%
Cooling off but still bleeding. Buy/sell ratio declining = retail losing interest.

Socials: https://x.com/blaaackguy | https://t.me/theblackwhalememe

⚠️ Verdict: Fresh pump.fun graduate getting dumped on. Down 60% in 24h with $600K volume means someone cashed out hard. Proceed with extreme caution — the whale has already eaten.

🔍 ANALYSIS: EAJgkX81DoYyE2GyhN9fx2YBDwiYRrrppZFDuUEKKKGq

Chain: Solana


🚫 STATUS: NOT TRADEABLE

| Check       | Result       |
| ----------- | ------------ |
| DexScreener | ❌ Not listed |
| Jupiter     | ❌ Not listed |
| Pump.fun    | ❌ Not found  |
| Any DEX     | ❌ No pairs   |
| Liquidity   | ❌ None       |


📊 ON-CHAIN DATA

| Metric           | Value              |
| ---------------- | ------------------ |
| Type             | SPL Token (valid)  |
| Supply           | 1,000,000,000 (1B) |
| Decimals         | 6                  |
| Mint Authority   | ✅ Renounced (null) |
| Freeze Authority | ✅ Renounced (null) |
| Total Txns       | 10 (most failed)   |
| Last Activity    | ~17 days ago       |


⚠️ VERDICT: DORMANT/ABANDONED

This token exists on-chain but:

1. Never launched — No DEX listings, no liquidity pools
2. Essentially dead — Only 10 transactions, most errored out
3. Can't be traded — Nowhere to buy/sell
4. ~17 days old — Created early Jan, never went anywhere
Possible scenarios:

• Failed launch that never completed
• Test token that was abandoned
• Token waiting for future launch (unlikely given age)
• Dev created it and walked away

🛑 RECOMMENDATION

Do not attempt to buy. There's no liquidity = no way to trade this.

If someone is trying to sell you this token or claiming it's "about to launch" — that's a scam setup. They may have pre-allocated supply and are looking for exit liquidity.

Where did you find this CA? 👀


⚠️ DYOR. Not financial advice. Marcus provides on-chain analysis only — your ape, your risk. Never invest more than you can afford to lose.

• 24h: 8 buys / 6 sells | +13.6%
• 6h: 7 buys / 5 sells | +16.6%
• 1h: 0 buys / 1 sell | -1.4%
• 5m: 0 buys / 1 sell | -1.4%
Reality Check:
This is a ghost town. 8 total buys in 24 hours. $736 volume. Still on pump.fun bonding curve at $7K MC. The "gains" are meaningless — one $50 buy moves this 15%.

Red Flags:

• ❌ Effectively dead (no liquidity, no activity)
• ❌ No socials detected
• ❌ Still on bonding curve after extended time
• ❌ Any entry = you ARE the liquidity
Verdict: This isn't a trade, it's a graveyard. Unless you personally know someone about to pump this, there's nothing here.

"Even the finest jazz cabbage can't save a dead chart." 💨

00:59
Amaro De Abreu
🔥 The numbers:

| Stage | Before | After |
| --------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------- |
| DexScreener | ~0.5s | 0.27s |
| Holder analysis | ~20-30s (20× sequential) | 1.02s (1× batch) |
| Helius total | ~35-45s | 2.49s |
| Total scan | ~40s | ~3-5s |That's a ~15x speedup. The "3 second" claim on X is now actually true. Plus non-admin users can scan again since the rate limit crash is fixed.

What changed:

1. Rate limit crash (FIXED) — check_rate_limit() now passes datetime objects instead of int timestamps to PostgreSQL. All non-admin users can scan again.

2. Holder analysis batched (FIXED) — Replaced 20 sequential getAccountInfo calls + up to 20 more program checks with 2 batch RPC calls. Down from ~25s → ~1s.

3. Creator lookups parallelized (FIXED) — Wallet age + token history now run via asyncio.gather() instead of sequentially.

4. Timing instrumentation added — [PERF] logs show exactly where time goes for future optimization.

So yeah, lets keep cooking, thanks for the beta guys, the findings and logs etc is super valuable for me to polish, enhance things and test things out!
❤
K
A

🚀 Welcome to the Devs Nightmare Bot! 🚀

I'm your advanced Solana token analysis assistant. Here's what I can do for you:

1. 🔍 Token Analysis:
- Scan any Solana token address for detailed information
- View token metadata, creator details, and DEX presence

2. 👥 Team Tracking:
- Analyze token team behavior and holdings
- Track creator and team member wallet activities
- Receive alerts on significant team sell-offs

3. 📊 First Buyers Analysis:
- Examine the behavior of early token adopters
- View a visual representation of top buyers' holdings

4. 💼 Portfolio Management:
- Track multiple tokens simultaneously
- Access a personalized dashboard of your tracked tokens

5. 🔔 Real-time Notifications:
- Get instant alerts on major team movements
- Stay informed about your tracked tokens' performance

To get started, simply send me a Solana token address, and I'll provide you with comprehensive insights!

Use /home to access your tracked tokens dashboard.

Happy analyzing! 📈
View Tracked Tokens

🎯 Advanced analytics — Deeper insights

⚠️ Group Chat = Basic scans only
💎 Private Chat = Full intelligence suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ 🚀 Quick Start ━━━

Never heard of before you invest:
1️⃣ /scan <token_address> — Check for rugs
2️⃣ Look at risk score (0-30 = safe)
3️⃣ Check LP lock status (🔒 = good, ⚠️ = risky)
4️⃣ Review Gini coefficient (<0.50 = healthy)

Choosing between tokens?
/compare <token1> <token2> — Side-by-side

Stalking a wallet?
/checkwallet <wallet> <token> — See their position

Check wallet reputation?
/reputation <wallet> — Trading history & score

Compare two wallets?
/comparewallets <wallet1> <wallet2> — Who's better?

Watching for dumps?
/watch <token> — Get whale alerts

━━━ 📖 Full Guide ━━━
/help — Complete feature guide
/guide scan — How to read scan results
/guide compare — When to compare tokens
/guide wallet — Wallet position guide
/guide whale — Whale alert setup

━━━ 💡 Quick Info ━━━
Type these keywords in chat:
CA PRICE BUY LINKS TOKENOMICS

━━━ 🎯 Pro Tips ━━━
✅ Scan BEFORE buying
✅ Check LP lock >80% secured
✅ Gini <0.70 (whale dominance risk)
✅ Creator wallet >7 days old (🔴 <7d = HIGH RISK)
✅ Scan multiple times for trends
✅ Compare with similar tokens

Built with 🕵️‍♂️ by Rug Munch Intelligence

Crypto Rug Muncher
I've been a bit slow on announcing this but it's mostly because I didn't think this would be developed until a bit later, but I am pleased to announce @MarcusRugIntel. We are still working on the branding and adding features, but this is our AI contract analysis agent that identifies bundled launches, tracks wallet connections, flags suspicious holder patterns, and breaks down token risk in real time. It will work on both X and Telegram alongside the full app we are developing.

For now, the bot is in limited preview to $CRM whales on Telegram but eventually it will be released to the entire community and be active on both platforms. This is part of an entire suite of security tools we are building to make crypto a safer place to be. Join us as we continue to develop these tools. Get $CRM.

🐦 NEW: Scan Tokens on X/Twitter

Marcus now replies to mentions on X with token analysis. Link your account and get scans without leaving the timeline.

How to set up (30 sec):
1️⃣ Send /linkx @yourXhandle to @rug_munchy_bot
2️⃣ That's it — you're linked

How to use:
Mention @MarcusRugIntel on X with a contract address:

@MarcusRugIntel CXCWuXtueDUM9aRZseYbesZTbaopSQcHxBomp7JMpump


Marcus replies with analysis based on your $CRM tier:
🐋 Whale — Full scan result posted on X
💎 Holder — Teaser + link to full scan
🆓 Free — Get $CRM to unlock

Commands:
/linkx @handle — Link your X
/linkx — Check status
/unlinkx — Remove link

The oracle is always watching. 🗿

More development work we have done on $CRM / $cryptorugmunch. Our developer is currently building a mini app over both our contract / wallet analysis tool as well as our AI agent @MarcusRugIntel. This will allow us to roll out and host web and mobile versions of our app suite sooner than initially expected.

We will also be able to track metrics of our users and reward those who use the app often to qualify for a larger percentage of future airdrops we will be offering, vote in the community DAO, handle our Rug Bounty Program, and more.

We will continue to build and deliver for our community as we have promised and the entire community will soon take note. You're still early. Get $CRM / $cryptorugmunch and help us as we build out the security tools this space desperately needs.
